injuries.comment: Hamilton (lower body) will be out of action for at least one week, Amanda Stein of the Devils' official site reports Saturday.
Brown did not play against Pittsburgh on Saturday (Nov. 8).
The Devils said on Wednesday (Oct. 15) that Markstrom will miss a couple of weeks.
The Islanders said on Sunday (Nov. 2) that Shabanov isn't close to returning to the lineup, according to Andrew Gross of Newsday.
